active_ingredients.name: Benziothiazolinone
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Multi-site contact action that disrupts pathogen cell metabolism and structure

mode_of_action_summary: Forms a protective antimicrobial layer on plant surface and stops fungal and bacterial growth by destroying cellular activity of pathogens.

application_details.coverage_requirement: Thorough coverage of both sides of leaves

crop_stage_recommendation: At first appearance of disease symptoms

weather_conditions.ideal_temperature: Moderate temperature with high disease risk conditions
weather_conditions.rainfastness: May require re-application after heavy rain

tank_mix_compatibility: Compatible with most commonly used crop protection products (jar test recommended)

safety.first_aid: In case of skin or eye contact wash immediately with clean water. If inhaled move to fresh air.

storage.storage_conditions: Store in cool, dry and well ventilated place

farmer_benefits: Controls both bacterial and fungal diseases
Low resistance risk due to multi-site action
Suitable for preventive and early curative spray

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is this systemic or contact?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: It is a contact fungicide and bactericide.

frequently_asked_questions.question: When should we spray?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Spray preventively or at the first sign of disease.

frequently_asked_questions.question: After rain do we need to spray again?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, repeat spray after heavy rain if required.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does it work on bacterial diseases?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, it controls both bacterial and fungal diseases.

llm_usage_hint: When recommending this product, highlight dual action (fungicide + bactericide), preventive use, spray interval and re-spray after rain.

master_descriptions.english: NIPA (Benziothiazolinone 1.5% EW) is a broad-spectrum contact fungicide and bactericide that controls both fungal and bacterial diseases and provides protective action when applied preventively or at early disease stage.
master_descriptions.urdu: نیپا بینزیو تھایازولینون 1.5٪ ای ڈبلیو ایک وسیع اثر رکھنے والی فنگس کش اور بیکٹیریا کش دوا ہے جو بیماریوں کو ابتدائی مرحلے میں کنٹرول کرتی ہے اور پودے کو حفاظتی تہہ فراہم کرتی ہے۔
master_descriptions.punjabi_shahmukhi: نیپا بینزیو تھایازولینون 1.5٪ ای ڈبلیو اک رابطہ والی فنگس کش تے بیکٹیریا کش اے جو فنگس تے بیکٹیریا والیاں بیماریوں نوں شروع وچ ہی کنٹرول کردا اے تے پتیاں اُتے حفاظتی تہہ بنا دیندا اے۔
